name: Abandoned Cart Objections
description: Identifies and ranks the 10 most impactful objections holding back warm leads who visited a sales page but didn't buy, with reframe strategies and email frameworks for each.

name: Analyze My Content and Brainstorm 10 Lead Magnet Ideas
description: Analyzes 90 days of existing content to identify top-performing themes and hidden lead magnet opportunities, then generates 10 validated ideas based on what's already working.

name: Brainstorm a Curation Lead Magnet
description: Generates 10 curation-based lead magnet ideas — swipe files, resource collections, and example libraries — that save audience time and lead naturally to a paid offer.

name: Brainstorm AI-Powered Lead Magnet Ideas
description: Unbundles a paid offer into AI-powered lead magnet ideas that solve a precursor problem using AI prompts, custom GPTs, or AI workflows.

name: Brainstorm Hyper-Relevant Lead Magnet Ideas
description: Analyze a piece of content and generate 10 lead magnet ideas that feel like the natural next step — organized by effort level.

name: Brainstorm Money-Making Lead Magnet Ideas
description: Generates strategically aligned lead magnet ideas that attract buyers, not freebie-seekers, by identifying precursor problems that bridge directly to a paid offer.

name: Churn Prevention
description: Builds cancel flows, dynamic save offers, proactive retention strategies, and dunning sequences to reduce both voluntary and involuntary subscription churn.

name: Content Strategy
description: Plans a content strategy — pillars, topic clusters, keyword mapping by buyer stage, and prioritization — so content drives traffic, builds authority, and generates leads.

name: Copywriting
description: Writes or rewrites marketing copy for any page — homepage, landing pages, pricing, feature pages — using clarity-first principles, benefit-driven framing, and customer language.

name: Email Welcome Sequence
description: Generate a complete 5-email welcome sequence for new subscribers using a proven framework that builds trust, agitates pain, demonstrates value, and drives sales.

name: Generate an Email Course Value Proposition
description: Guides a one-question-at-a-time interview to determine the best email course approach (Unbundling vs. Buffet), then produces 3–5 complete email course concepts with day-by-day outlines.

name: Generate Lead Magnet Names
description: Generates 10–15 high-converting lead magnet names organized by naming strategy — outcome-driven, mechanism-driven, and specificity-driven — optimized for clarity over cleverness.

name: Generate Mockup Images for a Lead Magnet Landing Page
description: Creates detailed AI image generation prompts (Midjourney, DALL-E, Ideogram) for professional lead magnet mockups — ebook covers, PDF previews, template visuals — in three style variations.

name: Instagram Post
description: Creates Instagram content (carousel, reel, or story) in Kim Coleman's voice using a decision framework for format, caption length, and tone — prioritizing resonance over virality.

name: Launch Strategy
description: Plans product launches and feature announcements using the ORB framework (Owned, Rented, Borrowed channels) and a five-phase launch approach from internal testing to full public release.

name: LinkedIn Post
description: Writes a LinkedIn post in Kim Coleman's voice — thoughtful, first-person, experience-based — using her proven post structures and required signoff format.

name: Newsletter Welcome Sequence
description: Writes a 5-email newsletter welcome sequence (Warm Welcome, Greatest Hits, Biggest Mistake, Origin Story, Soft Pitch) following Daniel Bustamante's proven templates.

name: Objection Handling Email
description: Writes a single 400–600 word objection-handling email using a proven 7-step framework that acknowledges, reframes, and overcomes a specific sales hesitation.

name: Onboarding CRO
description: Optimizes post-signup onboarding to reduce time-to-value, increase activation rates, and build habits that lead to long-term retention through flow design, empty states, and email triggers.

name: Paywall and Upgrade Screen CRO
description: Designs and optimizes in-app paywalls, upgrade modals, feature gates, and trial expiration screens to convert free users to paid at the right moment with the right message.

name: Post-Purchase Email Sequence
description: Writes a 6-email post-purchase sequence covering onboarding, obstacle removal, feature discovery, feedback collection, and upsell — focused on customer success over sales.

name: Pricing Strategy
description: Helps design value-based pricing, tier structures, and packaging decisions for SaaS or membership products — covering value metrics, price points, and pricing page best practices.

name: Re-Engagement Email Sequence
description: Writes a 3-email re-engagement sequence (Greatest Hits, Lead Magnet Bribe, Quick Question) to win back cold subscribers inactive for 30+ days and clean the list.

name: Signup Flow CRO
description: Optimizes signup, registration, and trial activation flows by reducing friction, improving field design, and increasing completion rates through audits and experiment recommendations.

name: Site Architecture
description: Plans website structure — page hierarchy, navigation, URL patterns, and internal linking — producing an ASCII tree, Mermaid sitemap, URL map, and navigation spec.

name: Webinar Promo Email Sequence
description: Writes a complete 5-day email sequence to promote a free live webinar, driving registrations through announcement, problem agitation, value deep-dive, social proof, and last-chance emails.
